prompt review git commit.body: Code review the current commit (check the current commit with `git rev-parse HEAD` [don't switch commits if this isn't what you expect]).

prompt review Mercurial commit.body: Code review the current commit (check the current commit with `sl log -l 1` [don't switch commits if this isn't what you expect]).

prompt review dir.body: Review the current directory and give feedback on how it can be improved.
